$comment: Governance: written by Planner tier (WO-0001); amended by change order (architect tier); read by Gatekeeper and gate lint; validates work-order YAML frontmatter. Field names and $id are codename-neutral per Constitution §1.3.
title: Work Order Frontmatter

status.description: Legal transitions per Constitution §8; transition legality is checked by gate lint, not this schema.

assignee_tier.description: The lowest tier that can complete the work.

gate.description: Who signs off at gated transitions; minimum: human at draft → released.

parent_feature.description: Feature id on the capability map; every order has exactly one parent.

depends_on.description: Order ids that must reach `complete` first.

conflicts.description: Concurrent orders touching the same writes. Forward provision; v0.1 dispatch is single-threaded.

reads.description: Exhaustive, normative — bounds what the builder may rely on.

discovery_roots.description: Optional — subtrees the builder may inspect for implementation facts; never a source of norms.

clarifications.description: Optional — ambiguities surfaced while drafting and their resolution. An order with any `open` entry should not pass draft → released.

writes.description: Exhaustive — bounds what this order may mutate.

spawns.description: Orders expected to be cut at closeout.
